sentences.text: I gave you my wheelbarrow, and now you will give me your plank.
Of course, the wheelbarrow is worth more than the plank, but true friendship doesn't care about that.
Please get it now, and I will start working on my barn today.
'Certainly,' said little Hans, and he ran to the shed and pulled out the plank.
